query: SELECT flowerName, pricingTier, focalPrice FROM harvest_listings WHERE flowerName IN ('Gaura', 'Yarrow (White)', 'Yarrow (Red)', "Lamb's Ear", "St John's Wort", 'Bee Balm (Pink)', 'Gomphrena (Red)', 'Verbena (Purple)') ORDER BY flowerName;
